---
name: Board Support Request
about: Request support for a new flight controller board
title: '[BOARD] '
labels: board-support
assignees: ''
---

**Board name:**
e.g., Holybro Pixhawk 6C Mini

**MCU:**
e.g., STM32H743

**Sensors:**
List the IMU(s), barometer(s), compass(es) on this board.

**ArduPilot hwdef available?**
If yes, link to the ArduPilot hwdef.dat file.

**Do you have this board?**
Yes/No — can you test firmware on it?

**Additional info:**
Datasheet links, pinout, anything helpful.
